chinese_news.title: Ozon大中华区总裁Simon Huang：中国卖家，正在涌向俄罗斯｜专访
chinese_news.summary:
编者按：上个月月底，36氪在厦门参加了一场Ozon全球招商启动大会，我们发现现场人山人海。火热的出海和国内经济形成鲜明对比，特别是一组数据吸引了我们注意：尽管俄罗斯电商渗透率在2025年才23%，但是Ozon在2017年至2025年间，实现了91%的年均复合增长率。

这些高增长数据背后，似乎隐藏着比较大的商业机会，但机会究竟是什么？中国卖家如何在AI时代抓住？那边电商处于什么阶段？带着这些疑问，36氪和Ozon大中华区总裁Simon Huang（黄效）进行了一次交流。结论就是：俄语区还有比较长的红利期，中国电商迁移过去有足够的品牌优势、供应链优势，以及运营优势。以下为正文：

过去几年，中国跨境电商最拥挤的地方，是欧美。

以深圳坂田、龙华、华强北为代表的无数跨境卖家，围绕亚马逊、独立站、TikTok Shop和Temu，构建起了一整套成熟的方法论：选品、投流、铺货、品牌化、海外仓、达人营销……。可以说，中国供应链几乎把全球电商卷了个遍。

但202

chinese_news.title: 融资超亿元、割草机器人公司拿下数亿订单，瞄准庭院具身终端｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，智能庭院机器人公司「长曜创新」近日完成数千万元A+融资，领投方为美的系上市公司盈峰环境，老股东XGROUP持续加注。资金将重点投入技术研发迭代、多SKU量产交付及产品矩阵拓展，持续夯实供应链能力，完善全球化渠道布局。此前，公司已于2025年12月完成A轮融资，半年累计融资金额超亿元。

长曜创新成立于2022年，长期专注户外庭院智能硬件赛道，聚焦无边界割草机器人的研发、设计与制造。公司依托自主技术研发与场景化创新能力，围绕草坪养护场景，构建庭院智能全生态系统。

根据Euromonitor等报告显示，2024年，全球割草机器人销售额占割草机总额的9.1%，处于较低水平。分区域看，欧洲市场存量渗透率达20%-30%，普及率较高，但无边界产品替代空间依然广阔；北美家庭草坪面积大、地形复杂，渗透率不足2%位数，是未来扩容的关键市场。

随着庭院机器人市场持续升温，竞争日趋白热化。面对日益同质化的价格战与功能堆叠，市场分化的背后，是现有产品力难以匹配用户的深层需求。长曜

chinese_news.summary:
撰文｜锅包柚

封面来源｜Unsplash（AI辅助扩图）

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 航空航天电气系统互联组件方案商获数千万融资，细分赛道市占率第一
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，青岛北辰航天航天科技有限公司（下称“北辰航天”）近日完成数千万元天使轮融资，由云启资本独家投资，翊荣资本担任长期独家财务顾问。

北辰航天旗下全资子公司青岛北辰数智科技有限公司成立于2014年，长期深耕航空航天电气系统互联组件研制领域，提供从设计到组装的系统工程解决方案。

电气系统互联是航天器的五大核心组成之一，类似于人体的“神经与血管”，承担电源分配、信号传输、测量控制等关键功能，具有高复杂度与高可靠性要求。随着商业航天、深空探测及低空飞行器的发展，仪器布局与电气系统互联（电缆网）敷设设计及配套电气系统互联组件产品正迎来新的需求增长。

据了解，北辰航天早期即以体制内外协方身份参与航天领域电气系统互联系统设计，深度参与多项运载型号的三维设计工作，技术成熟度行业领先。

经过十余年积累，北辰航天已具备面向航空航天企业的全流程一站式服务能力，从设备构型布局、电气系

chinese_news.title: 获高秉强、蓝驰领投数千万融资，浙大00后创业者从远景观测切入AI智能影像｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，星识（宁波）科技有限公司（以下简称“星识科技”）近日连续完成天使+轮和天使++轮融资，累计金额达数千万元。两轮融资分别由高秉强教授旗下高锋耐心资本和蓝驰创投领投、松禾资本跟投，老股东清水湾二期基金及奇绩创坛持续加注。本轮资金将主要用于智能影像核心技术研发、新品矩阵打造和产品体验的迭代优化，以及生产体系与供应链能力建设。此前，公司已获得李泽湘教授旗下宁波智能技术研究院、清水湾二期基金及奇绩创坛的种子轮及天使轮投资。

星识科技是一家专注智能影像技术研发与硬件制造的企业，以远景观测场景为切点，曾推出融合AI功能的Vizta智能望远镜，已在Kickstarter和Indiegogo众筹达数百万元。

望远镜作为长期被传统光学巨头主导的市场，正在被新生代创业者以消费级的智能化产品重新撬动。星识科技巧妙地通过结构设计与AI算法创新，将手机变为智能望远镜，不仅低成本、高效地实现了远景观测和拍摄的一体性，还通过AI功能进一步降低了产品操作门槛、丰富了产品玩法和趣味性。这种软硬件融合的创新解决

chinese_news.title: 「维新宇航」完成数千万元天使+轮融资，7座3吨级eVTOL将于7月进行首飞测试｜36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 阿至

36氪获悉，低空出行产品研制商「维新宇航」已完成数千万元天使+轮融资，本轮融资由策源资本领投、金舵投资跟投，资金将主要用于加速公司首款主力机型 Vector 5的研发迭代、首飞测试与适航取证进程。

维新宇航成立于2023年，是36氪长期关注的企业，其专注于大载客量、大载重eVTOL/eCTOL产品的研发及制造。加上6个月前连续完成的种子轮、天使轮，目前维新宇航已完成三轮融资，累计资金交割总额超亿元人民币。

现阶段，维新宇航的主力机型Vector 5为一款7座3吨级纯电复合翼eVTOL，该机型专注于应急救援和医疗急救等民生刚需场景，最大起飞重量为3180kg、最大载荷为680kg，最大航程300km、最高巡航速度为 250km/h，全尺寸样机已于去年6月正式下线。

chinese_news.title: 卡位黄金价格带，问界M6向下争夺年轻群体｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
2026年的中国新能源SUV市场正经历着前所未有的内卷。

问界依托华为技术体系，推出了定位更亲民的全新车型 M6， 瞄准主流家用消费群体。放在问界品牌整体销量连续数月下滑、赛力斯盈利能力承压的背景下，M6的到来既是“救兵”，更是一场不容有失的“大考”。

卡位黄金价格带，向下争夺年轻群体

从产品命名逻辑看，M6位于M5与M7之间，车身尺寸为4960×1985×1736mm，轴距2950mm，属于标准的中大型五座SUV。官方定位为“新锐智慧SUV”，目标用户从问界以往的主力“30岁以上家庭用户和商务人群”向下延伸至25-35岁城市年轻群体。

25-30万元是目前中国新能源SUV市场竞争最激烈的价格带——特斯拉Model Y、理想L6、小鹏G6、比亚迪唐等车型均在此区间鏖战。作为参考，理想L6起售价24.98万元，小鹏G6起售价20.99万元，Model Y后驱版26.35万元。问界M6以25.98万元起售，锚定的正是理想L6的核心区间，试图以更低门槛的增程方案和更激进的全系标配策略争夺年轻家庭用户。

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC holding $80K amid Fed inflation concerns and crypto bullish sentiment spike (Santiment flag) creates asymmetric upside if macro softens; Trump Media $406M loss signals forced liquidations pressuring price short-term.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (Santiment risk flag, BTC $80K hold, Fed hotter inflation print risk); CoinDesk (Trump Media markdowns); crypto sentiment divergence.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the SEC approve a spot prediction markets ETF by end of 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: SEC delay on prediction market ETF approval now echoing bitcoin fund battle precedent; Senate Clarity Act markup advancing signals regulatory thaw, but institutional gatekeeping remains.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (SEC delays on prediction markets ETFs); CoinDesk (Senate Clarity Act markup, market structure push resumes).

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Alphabet stock outperform S&P 500 by >10% in the next 12 months?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Alphabet's 160% rally over a year reflects AI 'full stack' dominance narrative; investors rotating from laggard to clear winner—momentum remains intact if search monetization accelerates.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Alphabet 160% rally, AI stack ownership thesis); macro backdrop of AI spending cycle.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Netflix's average revenue per user (ARPU) in ad-tier exceed non-ad tier by June 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Ad-free standard plan pushed to $20 signals streaming crossing inflection point where cheaper ad-supported plans generate equal or higher revenue—structural shift in content economics.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Netflix $20 ad-free standard, streaming tipping point into old TV model).

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum outperform Bitcoin (ETH/BTC ratio) in 2H 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Agentic commerce narrative and crypto rails adoption (PayPal, Google at Consensus Miami) favors smart contract platforms; BTC quantum migration risk noted (Project Eleven).
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (agentic commerce on crypto rails, PayPal/Google Consensus Miami); Project Eleven quantum migration risk; South Korea rotation from crypto to stocks suggests institutional repricing.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Walmart's revenue growth exceed Target's by >200 basis points in FY2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Company earnings reports (SEC filings), year-over-year growth rates.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Target's baby aisle refresh and convenience push is defensive—does not address structural Walmart/Amazon advantage. Market underestimates Walmart's logistics moat and Walmart+ penetration.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (Target refreshing baby category to compete with Walmart/Amazon); structural retail shifts.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will crude oil (WTI) close H1 2026 above $85/barrel given Iran war escalation and Saudi Aramco pipeline capacity?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CME WTI futures settlement price; NYMEX closing quote.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Saudi Aramco Q1 profit +26% and East-West pipeline mitigation narrative suggests energy shock priced in. But escalating Gulf attacks (Iran, UAE, Kuwait drones) and commercial vessel hits create tail risk upside.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (Saudi Aramco Q1 +26%, pipeline capacity); BBC (Iran war escalation, UAE/Kuwait drone attacks, commercial vessel hit off Qatar).

market_questions_to_create.question: Will used vehicle prices (Cox Automotive index) remain flat or decline through 2H 2026 amid EV adoption surge?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Cox Automotive Used Vehicle Price Index; monthly reports.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: First year-over-year used price decline + gas price spike driving EV interest = structural deflation in used market. Median car payment ($525) approaching affordability ceiling; younger cohorts rotating to used + EV.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (used car prices fall first time this year, EV interest rises, gas prices spike, affordability concern).

market_questions_to_create.question: Will China's cross-border ecommerce volume (GMV) to Russia via platforms like Ozon grow >50% YoY in 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Ozon public filings or market reports; Chinese customs ecommerce data.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 🚩 **CHINESE SOURCE SIGNAL**: 36Kr reports Ozon CAGR 91% (2017–2025) despite Russia ecommerce penetration only 23% in 2025. Chinese sellers flooding into Russia (Ozon Shanghai conference). Massive TAM expansion underpriced in Western prediction markets.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr (Ozon 91% CAGR, China sellers rushing Russia, Ozon 2026 recruitment surge); first-mover advantage in underpenetrated market.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will DeepSeek successfully raise ≥$400M (at any valuation) by end of 2026 after reported $500M max funding round?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Crunchbase, PitchBook, company press release, or Chinese regulatory filings (AMAC).
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 🚩 **CHINESE SOURCE SIGNAL**: 36Kr reports DeepSeek plans raise up to $500M—first major Chinese AI lab fundraising post-regulatory uncertainty. Western markets underestimate Chinese AI capital flows and DeepSeek's inference cost advantage.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr (DeepSeek $500M fundraise planned); competitive threat to OpenAI/Anthropic pricing; China AI spending acceleration.

investment_theses.thesis: Long crude oil (WTI via USO or /CL futures) on Iran war escalation and Saudi pipeline capacity constraints outweighing demand fears.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Saudi Aramco Q1 profit +26% on East-West pipeline capacity mitigation—suggests energy shock priced in but geopolitical tail risk unpriced.
BBC: Iran warns against US sanctions compliance; commercial vessel hit off Qatar; UAE and Kuwait report drone attacks.
Macro: Fed inflation print risk (hotter than expected per Cointelegraph) argues against demand destruction.
investment_theses.counter_view: Global recession fears, EV adoption (CNBC used car story), and US strategic petroleum reserve releases could overwhelm supply constraints. Saudi Aramco's own optimization suggests supply shocks are containable.
investment_theses.expression: Long /CL (WTI crude futures) June 2026 contract or USO ETF; target $85–90/barrel by June 30, 2026.

investment_theses.thesis: Long Alphabet (GOOGL) on AI full-stack dominance and search re-monetization, with upside if agentic commerce adoption accelerates.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Alphabet 160% rally reflects AI 'most of the stack' thesis; early laggard narrative reversed.
CoinDesk: Agentic commerce will run on crypto rails (PayPal, Google reps at Consensus Miami)—Alphabet indirect play on Web3 commerce layer.
Macro: AI capex cycle deepens; search share resilient despite ChatGPT hype.
investment_theses.counter_view: Valuation already reflects AI upside; regulatory antitrust pressure on search; OpenAI/Anthropic raise capital to compete on inference cost.
investment_theses.expression: Long GOOGL stock or QQQ (Nasdaq-100); outperform vs. SPY on 12-month horizon.

investment_theses.thesis: Long Ethereum (ETH) and short BTC/ETH ratio on smart contract adoption thesis for agentic commerce and crypto rails infrastructure.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Agentic commerce narrative at Consensus Miami; PayPal and Google representatives discuss crypto rails.
CoinDesk: BTC quantum migration 'too late' (Project Eleven)—implies smart contracts remain primary execution layer.
Macro: South Korea crypto holders rotating to stock market (Cointelegraph) = capitulation signal; retail repositioning into altcoins.
investment_theses.counter_view: BTC remains store-of-value leader; ETH London network upgrades priced in; Fed tightening could crush both; Solana/Sui alternative chain competition.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH perpetual futures vs. Short BTC perpetual (or long ETH/BTC ratio pair trade); or direct long ETH with 2–3x leverage if risk tolerance permits.

investment_theses.thesis: Long affordable used vehicles and used EV market (proxy: Cox Automotive index futures or automotive supplier stocks like MU for EV battery content) on structural deflation in used market + EV adoption inflection.
supporting_signals: CNBC: First YoY used car price decline this year; median payment hitting $525 affordability ceiling; EV interest surges with gas price spikes.
Cox Automotive: Affordability remains key buyer concern, driving rotation to older vehicles and EVs.
Macro: Oil price pressure (if Iran war escalates) = higher gas costs = faster EV adoption curve.
investment_theses.counter_view: Used EV battery degradation and repair costs not yet reflected in prices; supply shortage could reverse. Younger cohorts may delay vehicle purchase in recession. Chip shortage mitigation could stabilize new vehicle costs.
investment_theses.expression: Long MU (Micron, EV memory/storage content play) or semiconductor exposure (SMH); or thematic used-vehicle retail ETF if available (e.g., long Copart CPRT if liquidation auctions surge).

investment_theses.thesis: Long Chinese cross-border ecommerce platforms (if public: Ozon competitors, or proxy via Alibaba BABA on Ozon TAM growth) on Russia market underpenetration and Chinese seller supply.
supporting_signals: 🚩 36Kr: Ozon 91% CAGR (2017–2025); Russia ecommerce penetration only 23% in 2025—massive TAM remaining.
🚩 36Kr: Chinese sellers flooding into Russia (Ozon Shanghai conference, May 2026)—first-mover advantage.
Macro: Western sanctions on Russia push e-commerce adoption offline → online; Chinese supply chain fills vacuum.
investment_theses.counter_view: Western sanctions on Russia deepen, cutting off payment systems and logistics. Geopolitical risk escalation could halt cross-border flows. Ozon regulatory uncertainty in Russia/China.
investment_theses.expression: Long BABA if Ozon becomes material revenue driver; or direct position in Ozon (if accessible via ADR/Hong Kong listing). Alternatively, long emerging-market ecommerce ETF (EMQQ) as proxy for China-to-EM trade flows.
